title: The Ultimate Trapping Device
description: The perfect device to torture your friends :)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h_kLM9dDHRg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This tutorial shows you how to use the mod in-game with a crafting recipe.  At the momment, the mod only supports version 1.20.1.  There is a crafting recipe in the photo gallery if you need one :)  Enjoy the mod!

                                                                                      -Bryucraft
